MoonPlus.description:
Add MoonPlus require. Note: MoonAdditions must be required first.

local mad = require('MoonAdditions')
local mps = require('MoonPlus')

mps.VERSION.description:
MoonPlus

Returns the current MoonPlus version string.

return → string version_string

mps.placeable.from_memory.description:
MoonPlus — Placeable

Creates a placeable object from a raw memory address.

return → placeable

placeable:set_matrix_scale.description:
MoonPlus — Placeable

Scales the transformation matrix of the placeable object.

return → nil

placeable:get_matrix.description:
MoonPlus — Placeable

Returns the transformation matrix of the placeable object.

return → matrix

placeable:get_orientation.description:
MoonPlus — Placeable

Returns the orientation vector of the placeable.

return → vector3d

placeable:get_top_vector.description:
MoonPlus — Placeable

Returns the up/top direction vector of the placeable.

return → vector3d

placeable:get_forward_vector.description:
MoonPlus — Placeable

Returns the forward direction vector of the placeable.

return → vector3d

placeable:get_right_vector.description:
MoonPlus — Placeable

Returns the right direction vector of the placeable.

return → vector3d

placeable:is_within_area_2d.description:
MoonPlus — Placeable

Returns true if the placeable is within the given 2D rectangular area.

return → bool

placeable:is_within_area_3d.body: ${1:bool =} ${2:placeable}:is_within_area_3d(${3:float x1}, ${4:float y1}, ${5:float z1}, ${6:float x2}, ${7:float y2}, ${8:float z2})
placeable:is_within_area_3d.description:
MoonPlus — Placeable

Returns true if the placeable is within the given 3D rectangular area.

return → bool

mps.is_entity_pointer_valid.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Returns true if the given memory address is a valid entity pointer.

return → bool

mps.entity.from_memory.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Creates an entity object from a raw memory address.

return → entity

entity:get_rw_object_pointer.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Returns the RenderWare object pointer for this entity.

return → uint

entity:get_rw_object_type.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Returns the RenderWare object type (RP_ATOMIC = 1, RP_CLUMP = 2).

return → uint

entity:get_rw_atomic_pointer.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Returns the RenderWare atomic pointer for this entity.

return → uint

entity:update_rw_frame.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Updates the RenderWare frame for the entity, applying matrix changes.

return → nil

entity:set_rw_object_alpha.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Sets the alpha (transparency) of the RenderWare object. 0 = invisible, 255 = opaque.

return → nil

entity:get_bound_center.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Returns the center of the entity's bounding sphere as a vector3d.

return → vector3d

entity:get_com_distance_from_base.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Returns the distance from the entity base to its center of mass.

return → float

entity:has_pre_render_effects.description:
MoonPlus — Entity

Returns true if the entity has pre-render effects enabled.

return → bool

mps.physical.from_memory.description:
MoonPlus — Physical

Creates a physical object from a raw memory address.

return → physical

physical:apply_move_force.description:
MoonPlus — Physical

Applies a movement force vector to the physical object.

return → nil

physical:apply_turn_force.description:
MoonPlus — Physical

Applies a turning force to the object at the given velocity offset.

return → nil

physical:get_kinetic_energy.description:
MoonPlus — Physical

Returns the current kinetic energy of the physical object.

return → float

physical:skip_physics.description:
MoonPlus — Physical

Skips physics simulation for this object for the current frame.

return → nil

physical:get_friction_turn_speed.description:
MoonPlus — Physical

Returns the friction turn speed of the physical object as a vector3d.

return → vector3d

mps.is_vehicle_pointer_valid.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns true if the given address points to a valid vehicle.

return → bool

mps.vehicle.from_memory.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Creates a vehicle object from a raw memory address.

return → vehicle

mps.set_wheel_spin_values.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle (global)

Sets the global wheel spin rate parameters for all vehicles.

return → nil

mps.reset_wheel_spin_values.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle (global)

Resets wheel spin rate parameters to their default values.

return → nil

mps.set_wheel_spin_loss.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle (global)

Sets the global wheel spin loss value.

return → nil

mps.get_air_resistance.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle (global)

Returns the global air resistance multiplier.

return → float

mps.set_air_resistance.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle (global)

Sets the global air resistance multiplier.

return → nil

mps.get_bike_wheel_turn_force.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle (global)

Returns the global bike wheel turning force.

return → float

mps.set_bike_wheel_turn_force.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle (global)

Sets the global bike wheel turning force.

return → nil

vehicle:get_flying_handling_pointer.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns a pointer to the vehicle's flying handling data (if applicable).

return → uint

vehicle:blow_up.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Blows up the vehicle. Note: if you are inside the vehicle this may crash the game.

return → nil

vehicle:get_contact_wheels_count.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the number of wheels currently in contact with a surface.

return → int

vehicle:get_wheel_width.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the width of the vehicle's wheels.

return → float

vehicle:get_transmission.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the transmission object for the vehicle.

return → transmission

vehicle:get_audio.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the vehicle_audio object for the vehicle.

return → vehicle_audio

vehicle:tell_to_go_to.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Instructs the vehicle (e.g. helicopter) to fly toward the given coordinates within the altitude range.

return → nil

vehicle:get_wheel_suspension_compression.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the suspension compression of the specified wheel.
Use wheel_enum: FRONT_LEFT=0, REAR_LEFT=1, FRONT_RIGHT=2, REAR_RIGHT=3.

return → float

vehicle:get_wheel_rotation.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the rotation angle of the specified wheel.
Use wheel_enum: FRONT_LEFT=0, REAR_LEFT=1, FRONT_RIGHT=2, REAR_RIGHT=3.

return → float

vehicle:get_wheel_position.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the position offset of the specified wheel.
Use wheel_enum: FRONT_LEFT=0, REAR_LEFT=1, FRONT_RIGHT=2, REAR_RIGHT=3.

return → float

vehicle:get_wheel_speed.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the spin speed of the specified wheel.
Use wheel_enum: FRONT_LEFT=0, REAR_LEFT=1, FRONT_RIGHT=2, REAR_RIGHT=3.

return → float

vehicle:get_wheel_state.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the state of the specified wheel.
Use wheel_enum. Returns wheel_state: NORMAL=0, SPINNING=1, SKIDDING=2, FIXED=4.

return → int

vehicle:get_move_direction.description:
MoonPlus — Vehicle

Returns the current movement direction of the vehicle.

return → float

mps.transmission.from_memory.description:
MoonPlus — Transmission

Creates a transmission object from a raw memory address.

return → transmission

transmission:get_gear.description:
MoonPlus — Transmission

Returns the gear object for the specified gear index.

return → gear

transmission:calculate_gear.description:
MoonPlus — Transmission

Calculates which gear the vehicle should be in given the current speed and gear.

return → uint

transmission:calculate_acceleration.body: ${1:float =} ${2:transmission}:calculate_acceleration(${3:float gas}, ${4:uint gear}, ${5:float gear_change_count}, ${6:float speed}, ${7:float unk1}, ${8:float unk2}, ${9:bool all_wheels_on_ground}, ${10:uint handling_cheat})
transmission:calculate_acceleration.description:
MoonPlus — Transmission

Calculates the acceleration force for the given engine/gear/speed state.

return → float

mps.gear.from_memory.description:
MoonPlus — Gear

Creates a gear object from a raw memory address.

return → gear

mps.sound.from_memory.description:
MoonPlus — Sound

Creates a sound object from a raw memory address.

return → sound

sound:stop.description:
MoonPlus — Sound

Stops the sound from playing.

return → nil

sound:calculate_frequency.description:
MoonPlus — Sound

Calculates the sound's frequency based on its speed property.

return → nil

sound:update_frequency.description:
MoonPlus — Sound

Applies the calculated frequency to the sound stream.

return → nil

mps.is_ped_pointer_valid.description:
MoonPlus — Ped

Returns true if the address points to a valid ped.

return → bool

mps.ped.from_memory.description:
MoonPlus — Ped

Creates a ped object from a raw memory address.

return → ped

ped:is_standing.description:
MoonPlus — Ped

Returns true if the ped is currently standing (not airborne or fallen).

return → bool

ped:is_aiming.description:
MoonPlus — Ped

Returns true if the ped is currently aiming a weapon.

return → bool

ped:is_firing.description:
MoonPlus — Ped

Returns true if the ped is currently firing a weapon.

return → bool

ped:get_vehicle_pointer.description:
MoonPlus — Ped

Returns the raw memory pointer of the vehicle the ped is currently in.

return → uint

ped:clear_weapons.description:
MoonPlus — Ped

Removes all weapons from the ped.

return → nil

mps.game_settings.get.description:
MoonPlus — Game Settings

Returns the game_settings object for reading/writing game configuration.

return → game_settings

game_settings:save_settings.description:
MoonPlus — Game Settings

Saves the current game settings to disk.

return → nil

mps.get_forced_weather.description:
MoonPlus — Weather

Returns the ID of the currently forced weather type.

return → uint

mps.set_forced_weather.description:
MoonPlus — Weather

Forces a specific weather type. Use weather_type enum.

return → nil

mps.get_next_weather.description:
MoonPlus — Weather

Returns the ID of the next queued weather type.

return → uint

mps.set_next_weather.description:
MoonPlus — Weather

Sets the next weather type to transition into. Use weather_type enum.

return → nil

mps.get_current_weather.description:
MoonPlus — Weather

Returns the ID of the current active weather type.

return → uint

mps.set_current_weather.description:
MoonPlus — Weather

Sets the current active weather type. Use weather_type enum.

return → nil

mps.forecast_weather.description:
MoonPlus — Weather

Schedules a weather type to appear a given number of steps ahead in the forecast.

return → bool

mps.release_weather.description:
MoonPlus — Weather

Releases any forced weather, returning control to the game's weather system.

return → nil

mps.weather.get.description:
MoonPlus — Weather

Returns the weather object for reading/writing detailed weather properties.

return → weather

mps.get_extinguisher_aim_angle.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Returns the aim angle of the fire extinguisher weapon.

return → float

mps.set_extinguisher_aim_angle.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Sets the aim angle for the fire extinguisher weapon.

return → nil

mps.create_damage_event.body: mps.create_damage_event(${1:uint victim_pointer}, ${2:uint creator_pointer}, ${3:uint weaponType}, ${4:int damageFactor}, ${5:uint pedPiece}, ${6:int direction})
mps.create_damage_event.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Creates a damage event targeting the victim from the creator with the given weapon and parameters.

return → nil

mps.get_player_aim_scale.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Returns the player aiming reticule scale multiplier.

return → float

mps.set_player_aim_scale.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Sets the player aiming reticule scale multiplier.

return → nil

mps.get_shotgun_spread.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Returns the current shotgun pellet spread value.

return → float

mps.set_shotgun_spread.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Sets the shotgun pellet spread value.

return → nil

mps.get_shotgun_pellets_count.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Returns the number of pellets fired per shotgun shot.

return → uint

mps.set_shotgun_pellets_count.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Sets the number of pellets per shotgun shot. Max is 16 — higher values will crash the game.

return → nil

mps.get_spas_pellets_count.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Returns the number of pellets fired per SPAS-12 shot.

return → uint

mps.set_spas_pellets_count.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Sets the number of pellets per SPAS-12 shot.

return → nil

mps.get_pellets_collision_scale.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Returns the collision scale multiplier for shotgun pellets.

return → float

mps.set_pellets_collision_scale.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Sets the collision scale multiplier for shotgun pellets.

return → nil

mps.weapon.from_memory.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Creates a weapon object from a raw memory address.

return → weapon

mps.weapon.from_ped.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Returns the weapon object in the specified slot for the given ped pointer.
Use weapon_slot enum.

return → weapon

weapon:reload.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Reloads the weapon for the given owner ped.

return → nil

weapon:is_two_handed.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Returns true if the weapon requires two hands to hold.

return → bool

weapon:fire_sniper.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Fires a sniper-type shot from the creator toward the target position.

return → bool

weapon:fire_area_effect.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Fires an area-effect weapon (e.g. RPG) from the entity at the target.

return → bool

weapon:fire_instant_hit_from_car.description:
MoonPlus — Weapon

Fires an instant-hit weapon from a vehicle, specifying which side.

return → bool
